## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / preset
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Benchmark / test only
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `mypy` pass (if code changed)
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes (if docs/API changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes)
- [ ] New public API has docstrings
